description: Object.keys ObjToIterator helper enumerated inherited proxy-trap properties of the Proxy(Object, Object) set on Array prototype. Under --ion-eager, the JIT-compiled key enumeration walked into a recursive proxy handler before the iterator was finalized, tripping the disallowArbitraryCode() assertion in vm/Interpreter.cpp:406. sec-high regression of bug 1995077 (iterator-indices optimization). Fix: only enumerate own properties in ObjToIterator (git 1d09788fc823).
